name: Starco Brands, Inc.
summary: Starco Brands, Inc. (formerly Insynergy Products, Inc.), which we refer to as the Company, our Company, STCB, we, us or our, was incorporated in the State of Nevada on January 26, 2010 under the name Insynergy, Inc. On September 7, 2017, the Company filed an Amendment to the Articles of Incorporation to change the corporate name to Starco Brands, Inc.
